summary: Exposed deploy hook rotated. Old hook confirmed invalid. New hook URL never committed. Workflow fixed (no PR trigger). Native Vercel GitHub integration not completed — requires Dashboard OAuth. Fallback: GitHub Actions + stored secret.
hook_rotation_protocol: 1. Delete old hook: vercel deploy-hooks remove <id> --yes
2. Create new hook: vercel deploy-hooks create <name> --ref master
3. Copy new URL to GitHub Secrets → VERCEL_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL
5. Verify no hook URL remains in repository
manual_steps_required: Set VERCEL_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL GitHub secret to the new hook URL
Install Vercel GitHub app in GitHub repo for native auto-deploy
Set production branch in Vercel Dashboard → Settings → Git
